title: Green Slot Highlight
description: Makes the slot highlight contrast green
body:
![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e257fab61a1b21d234e206f78bae59e60cdf5c6.png)

🟩**The resource pack changes the slot highlight to a contrast green color, similar to Bedrock**

## ⚠️This is only possible from version 1.21.2 and higher
